steps.title: Set the y-expressions equal
steps.content:
Solve each equation for $y$:
$$
y=x+31-k
$$
$$
y=x^2-7x+k
$$
Set them equal:
$$
x+31-k=x^2-7x+k
$$

steps.title: Form a quadratic
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side:
$$
0=x^2-8x+2k-31
$$
The system has exactly one real solution when this quadratic has exactly one real root.

steps.title: Use the discriminant
steps.content: Set the discriminant equal to $0$: $$ (-8)^2-4(1)(2k-31)=0 $$ $$ 64-8k+124=0 $$ $$ 188=8k $$ $$ k=23.5 $$ The answer is 23.5.
